name: player_espn_overall_score range year_offset averages the grade window
description: ESPN overall score is a 0-100 grade; a range year_offset reduces with AVG, not SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(player_seasonlogs.espn_overall_score) FROM player_seasonlogs WHERE player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND player_seasonlogs.seas_type = 'REG') AS "espn_overall_score_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
